hooks.command: git worktree list --porcelain 2>/dev/null | awk '/^worktree/{wt=$2} /^branch refs\/heads\/claude\//{print wt}' | while read -r wt; do git worktree remove --force "$wt" >/dev/null 2>&1; done; git for-each-ref --format='%(refname:short)' refs/heads/claude/ 2>/dev/null | while read -r br; do git branch -D "$br" >/dev/null 2>&1; done
